text: Weak attractions can change everything. Hydrogen bonds are invisible yet powerful. They shape water's unique properties. These bonds hold DNA base pairs together, guiding life itself. In proteins, hydrogen bonds dictate how they fold, influencing their function. So, next time you drink water or think of DNA, remember these unseen forces. Want to dive deeper into the wonders of science? Hit that follow button!
